title: Generation Request
description: Package 5. A typed request to deterministically generate a draft artifact from a typed source artifact. A generation_request does NOT perform any generation itself — it is the typed input consumed by a generator script. The first generator in the pipeline is scripts/generate_concept_packet_stub.py, which accepts source_type=concept_brief and artifact_type=concept_packet_draft and writes a draft + manifest under generated/drafts/. No LLM calls, no network, no promotion: drafts never become authoritative without a separate promotion step that does not exist yet.

request_id.description: Stable ID for this request. Format: gr_YYYYMMDD_<6-char-random>. Never reused.

source_type.description: The kind of source artifact the generator reads. The Package 5 stub only handles concept_brief; build_plan is reserved for a future generator.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the source file.

hash.description: SHA-256 of the source file, with sha256: prefix. The generator refuses to run if the actual file hash does not match.

id.description: Optional stable ID from the source artifact (e.g., brief_id), for convenience.

artifact_type.description: The kind of artifact the generator will produce. Only concept_packet_draft is supported in Package 5.

target_path.description: Repo-relative directory where the generator will write its output files. MUST live under generated/drafts/ — the generator rejects any other path.

mode.description: Generation mode. Only 'draft' is supported in Package 5.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the request. Operators author the file with status=pending; the Package 5 stub reports status through the manifest rather than rewriting the request file. Future packages may add in-place request updating.
